===
ident_module
===

a=variable
a=Module.variable
a=Module.SubModule.variable
a=Module.SubModule.variable.field
a=Module.SubModule.variable.function()

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (variable_expr
        (identifier))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (variable_expr
        (module)
        (identifier))))

    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (variable_expr
        (module)
        (module)
        (identifier))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (field_access_expr
        target: (variable_expr
          (module)
          (module)
          (identifier))
        (identifier))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (function_call_pnc_expr
        caller: (field_access_expr
          target: (variable_expr
            (module)
            (module)
            (identifier))
          (identifier))))))
